TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Bulbul ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Umitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 58 buwan, 246 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 233 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 84%, Amis 2%, Puyuma 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 7%. qalang Bulbul ga maki 1 pqwasan biru. qalang Bulbul ga maki 1 kyokay. qalang Bulbul ga maki 1 hasisyo. qalang Bulbul ga maki 1 ngasal sexu. qalang Bulbul ga ungat khu skwan biru. qalang Bulbul ga ungat ngasal pkita nbu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Bulbul hya' ga Vahu. tay 'zil na Bulbul hya' ga Litu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βulβul ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu umitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, pujuma *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. qalaŋ βulβul ɣa maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru. qalaŋ βulβul ɣa maki * kjokaj. qalaŋ βulβul ɣa maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. qalaŋ βulβul ɣa maki * ŋas~ɕal s~ɕexu. qalaŋ βulβul ɣa uŋat kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. qalaŋ βulβul ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal pkita nβu. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βulβul ħjaʔ ɣa *aħu. taj ʔzil na βulβul ħjaʔ ɣa litu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Bulbul ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Umitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 58 buwan, 246 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 233 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 13 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 84%, Amis 2%, Puyuma 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 7%. qalang Bulbul ga maki 1 pqwasan biru. qalang Bulbul ga maki 1 kyokay. qalang Bulbul ga maki 1 hasisyo. qalang Bulbul ga maki 1 ngasal sexu. qalang Bulbul ga ungat khu skwan biru. qalang Bulbul ga ungat ngasal pkita nbu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Bulbul hya' ga Vahu. tay 'zil na Bulbul hya' ga Litu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βulβul ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu umitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, pujuma *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. qalaŋ βulβul ɣa maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru. qalaŋ βulβul ɣa maki * kjokaj. qalaŋ βulβul ɣa maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. qalaŋ βulβul ɣa maki * ŋas~ɕal s~ɕexu. qalaŋ βulβul ɣa uŋat kħu s~ɕkwan βiru. qalaŋ βulβul ɣa uŋat ŋas~ɕal pkita nβu. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βulβul ħjaʔ ɣa *aħu. taj ʔzil na βulβul ħjaʔ ɣa litu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
